title: The Commander Battles Intensify
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Kid, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Big Mom, Unknown person #4 as The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.
scene: The Skull Dome battles reach their final forms as Sanji, Zoro, Kid, Law, Yamato, and the alliance push back against the emperors and their commanders.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: S-She got crushed by the steel beams...!!

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: So your magnetic-magnetic fruit's awakened power....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Allows you to assign fields of attraction?! Part... Part...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Why the hell would I tell you?!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Crap!! She's using her soul pocus!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We still have some left, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: So... she's gonna take our lives?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll use one year of my own lifespan too.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: None of this Riff-Raff have powerful enough souls.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "It's been decades since I've felt pain like this...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The two of you and "Straw hat" Luffy are serious about taking our thrones!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Bring it on if you think you have a shot!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll show you what it means to be an Emperor!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll need to take down monsters like you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...if I ever want to uncover the true history!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No more holding back... we're going all out!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't give a damn what it costs, I'm gonna tear her from that throne!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 39 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
